title: septimetula hirsutissima
side_effects: Septimetula hirsutissima can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Overdosing on the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, potentially resulting in dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can cause dizziness, headaches, and impaired cognitive function. In extreme cases, improper use of septimetula hirsutissima can even trigger anaphylactic shock, a life-threatening condition that requires immediate medical attention.
